indexes._justification: CRITICAL (User Management) — Query: Get users filtered by role, sorted alphabetically by name. Used by searchUsers(query, { role: 'admin' }) in userService.ts for user directory with role filter. Composite index required for where(role) + orderBy(name).

CRITICAL (User Management) — Query: Get users filtered by status (online/away/inactive), sorted by email. Used by searchUsers(query, { status: 'online' }) in userService.ts for user directory with status filter. Composite index required for where(status) + orderBy(email).

CRITICAL (User Management) — Query: Get users sorted by creation date (newest first). Used by getAllUsers({ orderBy: 'createdAt', order: 'desc' }) in userService.ts for user directory showing recently added users. Single-field index required for orderBy(createdAt, desc).
Query: Get users filtered by both role and status. Used by searchUsers(query, { role: 'moniteur', status: 'active' }) for combined filtering.
Query: Get active courts sorted by number for court grid display. Used by getCourtsByFilter({ isActive: true }) in courtService.ts
Query: Get courts by status and type for filtering. Used by admin court management views.

CRITICAL (Phase 8.3 Court Management) — Query: Get reservations for a specific court on a date, filtered by status. Used by getCourtReservations() for court grid display. Composite index required for where(court_id) + where(status) + orderBy(start_time).

CRITICAL (Client Dashboard) — Query: Get user's upcoming reservations sorted by date. Used by getUpcomingReservations(userId) in dashboardService.ts for Client Dashboard. Composite index required for where(user_id) + orderBy(start_time).

CRITICAL (Phase 8.4 Reservations Management) — Query: Get instructor's upcoming lessons filtered by status. Used by getReservationsByFilter({ moniteurId, status }) for moniteur dashboard schedule view with status filtering. Composite index required for where(moniteur_id) + where(status) + orderBy(start_time).

CRITICAL (Phase 8.4 Reservations Management) — Query: Get today's active bookings for stats calculation. Used by getTodaysActiveBookings() to count confirmed/pending reservations for today, grouped by type. Composite index required for where(start_time range) + where(status) + orderBy(type).

CRITICAL (Court Availability) — Query: Get reservations for conflict detection during booking. Used by checkCourtAvailability() with time range queries. Composite index required for where(court_id) + where(end_time) + orderBy(start_time).

CRITICAL (Moniteur Dashboard) — Query: Get instructor's lessons by type (PRIVATE vs GROUP) sorted by date. Used by getClubEfficiencyStats() to calculate stats per session type. Composite index required for where(moniteur_id) + where(type) + orderBy(start_time).
Query: Get instructor's slots for a week. Used by moniteur slot management.
Query: Get available group slots for a specific date. Used by client booking flow for lesson selection.
Query: Get available slots sorted by date. Used by availability search.

CRITICAL (Moniteur Dashboard) — Query: Get instructor's weekly slots sorted by date and time. Used by subscribeToMoniteurSlots() for real-time weekly schedule display. Composite index required for where(moniteur_id) + where(date) + orderBy(start_time).

CRITICAL (Moniteur Dashboard) — Query: Get instructor's available slots only, sorted by date. Used by getAvailableMoniteurSlots() to show only bookable sessions. Composite index required for where(moniteur_id) + where(status) + orderBy(date).

CRITICAL — Query: Get active maintenance note (most recent first). Used by getActiveMaintenanceNote() in dashboardService.ts for Club Maintenance Note widget. Composite index required for where(is_active) + orderBy(created_at, desc).

CRITICAL (Admin Dashboard) — Query: Get court utilization data for chart. Used by getCourtUtilizationData(date) to calculate bookings per court. Composite index required for where(court_id) + where(start_time) + orderBy(type).

CRITICAL (Admin Dashboard) — Query: Get maintenance reservations tracking. Used by getMaintenanceCount() to count courts in maintenance. Composite index required for where(type) + where(start_time) + orderBy(status).
